name: ai-job-application-copilot
description: AI-powered job application copilot with resume analysis, job matching, and interview preparation

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: npm run start:backend & npm run start:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run init:db
scripts.init:db: cd backend && python -c "from database import init_db; init_db()"
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm run format:frontend && npm run format:backend
